ddls:
CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* Severity level of the model performance data */,
  "percentile" REAL /* Percentile score of the model performance data */,
  "ood_auroc" REAL /* Out-of-distribution AUROC score */,
  "ood_avg_conf" REAL /* Out-of-distribution average confidence score */,
  "id_acc" REAL /* In-distribution accuracy score */,
  "id_auroc" REAL /* In-distribution AUROC score */,
  "id_avg_conf" REAL /* In-distribution average confidence score */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "confidence_function" TEXT /* Confidence function used by the model */,
  "model_confidence_function" TEXT /* Composite string of model name and confidence function */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (classification, regression) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the performance data was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the performance data */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was evaluated */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  "confidence_interval_lower_bound" REAL /* Lower bound of the confidence interval */,
  "confidence_interval_upper_bound" REAL /* Upper bound of the confidence interval */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* JSON field to store model parameters */,
  "model_hyperparameters" TEXT /* JSON field to store model hyperparameters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_metadata" (
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (classification, regression) */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the model metadata */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* JSON field to store model parameters */,
  "model_hyperparameters" TEXT /* JSON field to store model hyperparameters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_name", "model_version")
)
